sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1699" key="a)eci/tokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀεξί-τοκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nourishing the fruit of the womb</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:614" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.614</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
